calendar.matters:
Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Martin for Louis Pacias (Petitioner).

Mr. Martin stated that there hasn't been any objection from any of the people entitled to notice, made reference to the Probate Examiner's notes regarding notice, stated that the intent of the Testator is to leave the property to his Sister Helen and that it doesn't make sense any other way. Mr. Martin also expressed concern stating that Mr. Pacias and the Successor Trustee have passed away, that a car ran into one of the buildings owned by this Trust, that the property needs to be repaired and that it has been pending since Halloween. The Court provided a clear explanation as to the Probate Examiner's roll. Mr. Martin stated that he did not give notice because he believes it was not required and that he believes the intent is clear when you read the document as a whole. The Petition to Appoint Successor Trustee was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee
